metadata.description: Comprehensive Indian compliance rules for code scanning

rules.title: Consent Before Processing
rules.description: Personal data must not be processed without explicit consent
rules.impact: Violation penalty: ₹5 crore or 2% annual turnover, criminal liability

rules.title: Purpose Limitation
rules.description: Data must only be used for disclosed, consented purposes
patterns: collect for X, use for Y
rules.impact: Data processing for unauthorized purpose = violation

rules.title: Data Minimization
rules.description: Only necessary personal data should be collected and processed
patterns: collect: [email, phone, address, ssn, dob]  // Too much data
return {...user, ssn, phone, address, dob}  // Excessive

rules.title: Data Breach Notification
rules.description: Notify users within 72 hours of discovering a breach

rules.title: User Rights Implementation
rules.description: Implement right to access, rectification, erasure, portability
patterns: No access log for user requests

rules.title: Authorization Control
rules.description: Authorization must be enforced on server-side, not client-provided

rules.title: Transaction Atomicity
patterns: balance = get_balance(); if balance > amount: debit();  // Race condition
await select(); // ... gap ... await update();  // Concurrent
rules.impact: Race conditions = double charging, financial loss

rules.title: Encryption in Transit and at Rest
rules.description: Use TLS 1.2+ for transit, AES-256 for rest

rules.title: Immutable Audit Trails
rules.description: Maintain 3-year audit logs of all transactions
rules.impact: Missing audit logs = non-compliance, cannot prove legitimacy

rules.title: Rate Limiting and Brute-Force Protection
rules.description: Implement rate limiting on sensitive operations
rules.impact: No rate limiting = brute-force attacks, account takeover

rules.title: Anti-Market Manipulation
rules.description: Prevent unfair trading practices and information asymmetry
rules.impact: Market manipulation penalty under SEBI Act

rules.title: Transparency in Trading
rules.impact: Lack of transparency = investor protection violation

rules.title: Unauthorized Access Prevention
Sensitive Data Protection
Input Validation
rules.description: Validate all inputs to prevent injection attacks
rules.section: IT Act Section 65 - Tampering with Computer Source
patterns: query = 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ' + request.id
rules.impact: Section 65 - Tampering = imprisonment up to 3 years

rules.title: Data Accuracy
rules.description: Data must be accurate and verified
rules.impact: Poor data quality affects business decisions

rules.title: No Hardcoded Credentials
rules.description: Never store API keys, passwords in code

rules.title: SQL Injection Prevention

DPDPA.title: Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023
DPDPA.authority: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)

patterns: collect for X, use for Y

dpdpa_003_data_minimization.description: Only necessary personal data should be collected and processed
patterns: collect: [email, phone, address, ssn, dob]  // Too much data
return {...user, ssn, phone, address, dob}  // Excessive
